name: Execution agent of Counterparty 1
description: This data element reports the execution agent that entered into the transaction as agent for the Reporting Entity without becoming a counterparty themselves.
format: LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) with a registration status of ‘Issued’, ‘Lapsed’, ‘Pending transfer’ or ‘Pending archival’. Must not be an LEI of a branch of the entity. For reports with Action types REVI, TERM, EROR or PRTO, any LEI registration status is allowed.
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for Action types: NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI
Optional for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: Execution agent of Counterparty 1 must not equal Reporting Entity or Counterparty 1 or Counterparty 2.
For transactions directly executed by Counterparty 1, Execution agent of Counterparty 1 is not reported.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
